mapper.sql: SELECT id, scope_type, scope_id, event_category, channel, code, title_template, content_template, is_security, is_unsubscribable, status, created_at, updated_at FROM notification_template
mapper.select: WHERE id = #{id} AND scope_type = 'domain' AND scope_id = #{scopeId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_template SET event_category = #{eventCategory}, channel = #{channel}, code = #{code}, title_template = #{titleTemplate}, content_template = #{contentTemplate}, is_security = #{isSecurity}, is_unsubscribable = #{isUnsubscribable}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND scope_type = 'domain' AND scope_id = #{scopeId}
